entities.name: Placeholder Scan
entities.context: Command (placeholder-scan) that scans conversation workspace for placeholders, stubs, and incomplete code before work leaves conversation context

entities.name: P16 (Accuracy Over Sophistication)
entities.context: Principle enforced by placeholder scanning to ensure accuracy over sophistication

entities.name: P21 (Document Assumptions)
entities.context: Principle enforced by placeholder scanning requiring documented assumptions

entities.name: P19
entities.context: Principle violated by empty exception handlers (except: pass patterns)

entities.name: conversation-end workflow
entities.context: Workflow where placeholder scan integrates automatically at Phase 2.5

relationships.context: Tool enforces this principle by detecting incomplete/inaccurate code
Tool enforces this principle by detecting undocumented assumptions and invented constraints
Tool detects P19 violations via empty exception handler detection
Runs automatically at Phase 2.5 of this workflow
